title: Handle and transport samples or equipment
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Handle and transport samples or equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for pickup

pcs.text: Confirm pickup sequence and any licence or permit requirements with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm pickup sequence and any licence or permit requirements with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm pickup sequence and any licence or permit requirements with supervisor.

pcs.text: Follow workplace procedures to confirm that vehicle and communication devices are in working order

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace procedures to confirm that vehicle and communication devices are in working order.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that required transport containers and materials are in the vehicle.
